remaining_tasks.name: Fix remaining 51 E2E failures
remaining_tasks.progress: 77→51 failures this session. 236 passing, 51 failing, 67 did not run, 9 skipped.

decisions.decision: Switch Alembic to psycopg2 sync driver when DATABASE_URL_SYNC available
decisions.rationale: asyncpg prepared-statement protocol rejects complex DDL (CREATE FUNCTION with $$ bodies). psycopg2 handles natively.
SQLAlchemy text() parameter handling conflicts with PL/pgSQL %% format specifiers in RAISE statements
RBAC org-level tests failed because E2E users had campaign roles but no organization_members records. Fixed all org-level RBAC failures.

decisions.decision: Replace admin@localhost with owner1@localhost in login.spec.ts
decisions.rationale: ZITADEL admin gets forced password change on fresh environments; E2E test users don't
Manual browser.newContext() doesn't inherit Playwright config baseURL; 5 serial blocks needed explicit baseURL

next_action: Fix remaining 51 E2E failures in 7 categories: (1) RBAC campaign-level nav — 9 failures in rbac.manager/viewer/volunteer specs, likely sidebar navigation timing, (2) voter suite cascading — 8 failures in later serial tests, (3) phase verification — 8 failures in phase13/14/29/35, (4) operations — 6 failures in surveys/shifts/phone-banking/turfs/walk-lists/call-lists, (5) volunteer — 3 failures, (6) UI/cross-cutting — 5 failures (tooltips, empty states, a11y), (7) other — 3 (campaign-settings, navigation, org-management). Commit all 34 modified files first, then dispatch targeted agents per category.
context_notes: Clean environment reset this session: docker compose down -v, fresh DB, fresh seed, fresh E2E users with org memberships. Alembic migration 017 fixed for fresh-start compatibility (asyncpg→psycopg2). Session used two rounds of agent teams (6 agents, then 4 agents). The org membership fix resolved ALL org-level RBAC failures. Remaining 51 failures are mostly: campaign-level navigation timing (RBAC), cascading serial test failures (voter/ops suites where early tests now pass but later tests have new issues), and untouched specs (cross-cutting, a11y, tooltips, some phase verifications). Full suite runs in ~8.5min with 4 workers.
